response.step_by_step_log:
1.  Identified on-screen text "とある竜の恋の歌" (Toaru Ryuu no Koi no Uta) at 01:53, which is the song title.
2.  Identified performers as Shishiro Botan and Aki Rosenthal.
3.  Search query used: "とある竜の恋の歌" Japanese and English lyrics.
4.  Found the lyrics on Lyricstranslate and other sites, used a combined version for the final JSON.
response.global_summary: The video begins with a title card, followed by a dialogue segment between virtual characters Shishiro Botan and Aki Rosenthal. It then transitions into a musical performance of the song "とある竜の恋の歌", which continues until the end of the video.

scenes.description: Performance starts with the text "とある竜の恋の歌" appearing on-screen. Shishiro Botan and Aki Rosenthal sing the song.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Draco in fabula (伝説の中の竜)
In dracone hora (鱗に宿る時間)
In dracone spes (鱗に託す望み)
In dracone error (鱗に浮かぶ迷い)
In dracone veritas (鱗に眠る真実)
In dracone somnium (鱗にうつろう幻)
In dracone fatum (鱗に映す宿命)
In dracone causa (鱗に隠した理由)
とある竜の恋の歌
音のない第一の大地に響けば
錆びた竜の歯車 埋められぬ定めが
弾けた
今 蘇りし命のために
いにしえより近づく 轟く恋
目覚めた
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Draco in fabula (Dragon in a legend)
In dracone hora (Time dwelling in the scales)
In dracone spes (Hope entrusted to the scales)
In dracone error (Doubt floating on the scales)
In dracone veritas (Truth sleeping in the scales)
In dracone somnium (Illusion shifting in the scales)
In dracone fatum (Destiny reflected in the scales)
In dracone causa (The reason hidden in the scales)
The song of a dragon, a certain love
Resounding in the first of the world without sound
The rusty gears of the dragon, the fate that couldn't be sealed
Burst open
Now, for the sake of the life that has been reborn
Reaching for the ancient, approaching, detonating love
Awakened...
